creator: vanderh@ecf.utoronto.ca
text:
On Tue, 22 Sep 1998, Lachlan O'Dea wrote:

> When I looked up MLINKS on my -stable box, I was looking at an old
> bsd.port.mk. Doh. It makes sense now. 
> 
> So I think I've finally got it right. Thanks for the help.

Looks good to me.  Now, I have to apologize a little, because after all
this you're still going to have to wait for someone to actually review
the port.  It's been demonstrated that Steve & co. are infinitely faster
at reviewing and committing new ports than I am, so they usually get
to it.


-- 
Me.  Who'd you think sent this?
